summary: Full e2e test of Hampton Crest Academy MVP: backend auth API (health, register, login, me, logout) and frontend (login UI, route guards, sidebar nav + collapse, mobile drawer, topbar profile dropdown / logout, member profile, register flow). 16/16 backend pytest cases pass; 18/18 frontend Playwright assertions pass.

minor.issue: Response serializes user id under key '_id' (MongoDB ObjectId stringified) instead of 'id'. UserPublic uses Field(alias='_id') with populate_by_name=True; by default Pydantic dumps by alias, so the public JSON leaks the Mongo internal key name. Frontend currently does not consume user.id so nothing is broken, but it is a code-quality issue (per project rule: never expose _id). Fix: add model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True, by_alias=False) on serialization (e.g., response_model_by_alias=False on endpoints, or rename field).

action_items: Optional (minor): set response_model_by_alias=False on /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me so the public JSON returns 'id' instead of '_id'. Frontend works either way today, but this aligns with the 'never leak Mongo _id' rule.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py UserPublic uses alias='_id' so all auth responses currently return '_id' rather than 'id' in JSON. Minor leak of Mongo internal key.
JWT secret is committed in /app/backend/.env — fine for preview but rotate before production.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login. Playbook mentions lockout after 5 failures; not implemented. Acceptable for MVP but worth noting.
Logout is stateless (no token revocation list); documented in code, acceptable for MVP.
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via lib/api; localStorage key 'hc_access_token' matches spec.
All required data-testid attributes are present and stable; sidebar collapse animates from 260px -> 72px correctly.
test_credentials: Seeded admin admin@hamptoncrest.com / Hampton#2026 (verified). Test members created during runs use test_member_<uuid>@example.com / TestPass#2026 and test_reg_<ts>@example.com / Charter#2026!
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_/test_ member accounts created in MongoDB users collection during test runs. They are isolated (unique emails) and do not interfere with admin or with each other.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth.py covers health + full auth surface (16 tests, all passing). Note: pydantic EmailStr rejects '.test' TLDs as reserved — use @example.com in tests. The auth/me response currently returns '_id' (not 'id') because of the Field(alias='_id') on UserPublic — accept either key when asserting on user payload. Admin in DB is auto-seeded/updated on backend startup via seed_admin().
rca of the issue: No critical bugs encountered. Initial test failures were due to test-side issues only: (1) usage of '.test' TLD which pydantic EmailStr rejects (RFC 2606 reserved) — fixed by switching test emails to @example.com; (2) asserting 'id' in user payload while API returns alias '_id' — accepted both. Both fixes are in /app/backend/tests/test_auth.py.
